chime.description: Soft melodic chime — gentle positive beat: success/confirmation or a lighthearted transition. Sync to the visual moment.

click-soft.description: Quiet short click — low-key UI tap / soft selection. Short accent, sync exactly to the on-screen action.

click.description: Crisp UI click — button press, toggle, selection. Short accent, sync exactly to the on-screen action.

error.description: Negative / error tone — failure state, a 'wrong' beat, or a glitchy interruption.

glitch-1.description: Punchy digital glitch — hard-cut accent or sudden reveal. Trigger on the hit; let the decay bleed into the next shot (J-cut).

glitch-2.description: Harsh, longer glitch — chaotic / jarring transition or a distorted reveal.

glitch-3.description: Low-key glitch texture — subtle digital shift, minimal transition that sits under other audio.

impact-bass-1.description: Bass impact hit — logo/hero snap, headline slam. Trigger on the visual landing; decay carries into the next shot (J-cut).

impact-bass-2.description: Bass impact with a short swell — brief anticipation then a deep hit. Place so the peak lands on the reveal.

key-press.description: Single key press — one keystroke / terminal-input beat. Short accent, sync to the typed character.

notification.description: Notification chime — alert, message-in, toast/badge appears. Sync to the element entering.

ping.description: Sharp electronic ping — punchy accent on a key reveal or data point. Sync to the beat.

pop.description: Quick pop — element appear/spawn, chip/tag/badge in. Small precise accent, sync to the pop-in.

riser.description: Long cinematic riser (~10s build, peak at the end). Trigger at (climax_time − 10.03s) so it crests exactly on the reveal.

sparkle.description: Bright sparkle / shimmer — magical reveal or 'shine' highlight on a hero element. Sync to the highlight.

typing.description: Typing burst (~1.5s of keys) — keyboard / code typing reveal, text-being-typed beat. Start as the text begins typing.

whoosh-cinematic.description: Cinematic whoosh build (~5.5s) — sweeping scene transition. Align so the swell peaks on the cut.

whoosh-short.description: Short whoosh — quick swipe/slide accent, fast element move, snappy transition. Sync to the motion.

whoosh.description: Punchy whoosh/impact — fast reveal or hard transition accent. Sync to the motion.
